description_long: This sconce features a classic candelabra design with three upward-facing arms branching symmetrically from a central, ornately contoured stem. The base is wide and rounded, providing stability and a sense of traditional elegance. Each arm ends in a cup-like holder, likely intended for candles or candle-shaped bulbs, and the arms are gently curved with a subtle decorative flair. The entire fixture appears to be made of a dark, metallic material, possibly wrought iron or bronze, with a matte or slightly aged finish. The silhouette is intricate, with multiple curves and ornamental details along the stem and arms, evoking a vintage or antique aesthetic. This sconce would be well-suited for mounting on a wall in a historic urban setting, such as along a street or in a park.
description: A vintage-style, three-arm candelabra sconce with ornate curves and a dark metallic finish, designed for wall mounting. Its classic silhouette and decorative details evoke an antique, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three arms and candle holders symmetrically branching from the central stem.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the central stem and the alignment of the arms, with only one arm visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all three arms and holders visible, highlighting the symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the central stem and a single arm.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features classic candelabra styling with curved arms and a decorative, contoured stem, evoking a traditional and elegant aesthetic.
